## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description                              | Type                                                                | Default     |
| ---------- | ---------- | ---------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `disabled` | `disabled` | Whether the button is disabled           | `boolean`                                                           | `false`     |
| `loading`  | `loading`  | Whether the button is in a loading state | `boolean`                                                           | `false`     |
| `size`     | `size`     | Button size                              | `"lg" \| "md" \| "sm"`                                              | `'md'`      |
| `type`     | `type`     | HTML button type attribute               | `"button" \| "reset" \| "submit"`                                   | `'button'`  |
| `variant`  | `variant`  | Visual style variant                     | `"destructive" \| "ghost" \| "outline" \| "primary" \| "secondary"` | `'primary'` |


## Events

| Event      | Description                                                               | Type                |
| ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------- |
| `arcClick` | Emitted when the button is clicked (not emitted when disabled or loading) | `CustomEvent<void>` |
